canaries.title: Produce an accepted bounded Athanor-core fix
canaries.rollback_path: git revert the bounded patch or archive the packet if adoption is rejected
canaries.closure_rule: Land one bounded repo-safe change with passing verification and explicit acceptance proof.

canaries.title: Produce an accepted runtime packet outcome
canaries.rollback_path: reopen the runtime packet and restore the prior packet state
canaries.closure_rule: Execute or route one bounded runtime packet with acceptance evidence and no mid-flight steering.

canaries.title: Produce a visible dashboard value proof
canaries.rollback_path: revert the bounded dashboard slice and restore the previous visible state
canaries.closure_rule: Ship one operator-visible dashboard improvement with proof and acceptance evidence.
canaries.task_brief: Add an autonomous value proof summary to the command-center overview. Surface operator/product counts, latest accepted proof, and remaining product proofs in a front-door card without crowding the current operational triage.

canaries.title: Produce a visible builder front-door value proof
canaries.rollback_path: revert the bounded builder front-door slice and restore the prior visible state
canaries.closure_rule: Ship one operator-visible builder/front-door improvement with proof and acceptance evidence.
canaries.task_brief: Promote autonomous value proof into the builder front-door summary on the operator console. Surface stage badges, latest accepted proof, and remaining product proofs alongside the builder posture so the operator can see builder usefulness at a glance.
